phases.reason: Shipped manifest does not define the exact engine binaries and hashes required for a compliant black-box audit.
Audit halted before execution because binary provenance and fixed-runtime requirements were not satisfied.
Audit halted before execution because compliant execution could not be established from shipped binaries and manifest data.
Shipped performance artifacts do not demonstrate 10,000 req/s sustained in every 10-second window for 300 seconds, and one published profile is below 10,000 req/s.
No compliant fixed-binary execution path was available for independent fault testing under the provided rules.
No compliant fixed-binary execution path was available for independent bypass attempts under the provided rules.
This environment did not provide the required real external traffic routing setup, second machine, or observer verification path.
No independent evidence was provided proving that no floating-point operations occur anywhere in the cost path.

critical_failures: No manifest entry pins the exact MNDe engine binaries required for execution.
Published audit harness executes TypeScript via node --experimental-strip-types and Rust via cargo run --release, violating no-transpile and no-rebuild requirements.
No git commit hash is available in the shipped workspace.
No independently verifiable auditor public-key signing material was shipped; receipts use HMAC key identifiers instead.
No compliant second-machine parity proof was possible from the provided workspace.

final_outputs.audit_report_pdf_reason: Audit halted during precondition enforcement; no compliant executable audit dataset existed from which to generate a final PDF under the requested rules.
